title: Create Da Estrogen
description:
A Medium sized modpack focused on the create mod and cobblemon with lots of addons with plenty to build and explore
Make the factory grow and conquer the world
body:
Create megafactories with create and collect them all in cobblemon.
Defend your land with big cannons and become Walter white and create an empire of blue and white stuff or make a girl factory and generate estrogen.
Explore the world with air craft to search for resources to automate your factory.
